# datahub_tag (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub tag by `tag_id`.

Use this to reference a tag that already exists in DataHub -- for example one created in the DataHub UI or via the Python SDK -- without taking ownership of it.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tag_id` (String) The unique identifier of the tag to look up (the URN suffix, e.g. `pii`).

### Read-Only

- `color_hex` (String) Display colour of the tag badge (e.g. `#FF6B6B`). Empty if not set.
- `description` (String) Description of the tag. Empty if not set.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name of the tag.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this tag (e.g. `urn:li:tag:pii`).
